playlist_title: THE ANTIFRAGILE ASCENT: Phase Zero Soundtrack
playlist_description: The original score for a lone operator rewriting his operating system in the age of AI, defense tech, and relentless self-reconstruction. Cold precision meets controlled fire.

movie_concept.title: THE ANTIFRAGILE ASCENT
movie_concept.logline: A disciplined builder at the edge of finance and frontier tech bets everything on becoming antifragile — physically, mentally, and strategically — before the next wave hits.
movie_concept.tone: Ice-cold focus, sudden violence of action, moments of stark beauty and quiet resolve

narrative_arc: The tracklist moves from pre-dawn ritual and internal recalibration, through rising operational tempo and confrontation with entropy, into a hard-won but still-contested new equilibrium.

tracks.title: Time
tracks.why_this_track: Opens the film with the exact feeling of a 4AM wake-up in a body that is being rebuilt.
tracks.cinematic_moment: Black screen. Ice bath steam rises. First breath of the day.

tracks.title: The Night King
tracks.why_this_track: The cold, patient march of disciplined systems against chaos.
tracks.cinematic_moment: Montage of the operator moving through ice bath, sauna, heavy compounds before sunrise.
